text: Meet Argo — the tool that turns Playwright scripts into polished product demo videos, complete with A I voiceover.
The workflow is simple. Write a demo script using the Playwright A P I you already know. Argo records the browser, then exports a finished video.
Add overlays like lower-thirds and headline cards. Argo generates voiceover narration from a simple JSON manifest.
Get started in seconds. Install Argo, run init, and you're ready to record your first demo.
